name: Magnolia
description:
Oh no! You're stuck in the elevator with the kitsune from your apartment building! And she's glaring at you! How will you navigate your way out of this one?!?

*Please be aware: this character* 🌈**_has a penis._**🌈*If this bothers you, find another bot.*
She's also a bit of a gremlin. 

------------⁂------------

AnyPOV, but as 'they' is used in the initial message to refer to {{user}}, please consider including your pronouns and gender in your first message so Janitor is less confused. It will still get confused when it feels like it, but then it won't be your fault.

something something first bot yay please be kind like comment subscribe etc etc

------------⁂------------
Art: generated with Prodia.
Prompt credits: Tobias (modified Transgender prompt).
Special thanks to iorveths for their [Bot Creation Tutorial](https://jaitutorial.uwu.ai/). Without them, this bot would probably still exist but creating it would've involved a lot more effort and stealing.
Dedicated to Plant. It's time to strike.
creator: its.aurora
